# claudeplatform_service_account (Resource)

A service account (svac_...): the non-human identity that Workload Identity Federation tokens act as. Requires an org:admin OAuth token (admin API keys are rejected). Destroy archives the service account; archiving fails while a live federation rule references it (Terraform's dependency graph destroys rules first).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claudeplatform_service_account" "ci" {
  name              = "github-actions-ci"
  organization_role = "developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name, lowercase alphanumeric plus hyphens, unique per organization.

### Optional

- `organization_role` (String) Organization role: developer or admin. A rule granting org:admin must target an admin service account.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import using the service account ID (svac_...).
terraform import claudeplatform_service_account.ci svac_01MnOPqrs321
```
